messages.content: paraphrase this: Laptop has alreadyy been connected ato printer and printing correctly.
The laptop has been successfully connected to the printer and is printing accurately.
paraphrase this: We will check for old laptop and let you know if we got any.
We'll look for an old laptop and inform you if we find one.
paraphrase: Is jAcob Garcia still employed by Milestone?
Does Jacob Garcia still work at Milestone?
paraphrase this: Kindly clraify if you don't have existing account in Servicedesk? Or you cannot login?
Please clarify whether you do not have an existing account in ServiceDesk or if you are unable to log in.
paraphrase this: Priner is working fine and there is sample hard copy printed from the laptop.
The printer is functioning properly, and a sample document has been successfully printed from the laptop.
paraphrase this: We will check your profile in MenaMe and will update you at the earliest.
We will review your profile on MenaMe and provide you with an update as soon as possible.
paraphrase this: Username has been updated. The change will take effect after 24 hours.
The username has been changed. The update will be effective after 24 hours.
paraphrase this: Noted on this. We'll keep the laptop and will not do something on it.
Understood. We will retain the laptop and refrain from making any changes to it.
paraphrase this respectfully: Noted on this. We’ll keep the laptop and will not do something on it.
Acknowledged. We will hold onto the laptop and ensure that no action is taken on it.

paraphrase this respectfully: Noted on this. We acknowledge your request to retain the laptop without making any changes to it. Please raise a ticket so that we know to whom we will hanover the laptop.
Acknowledged. We understand your request to keep the laptop unchanged. Kindly submit a ticket so we can identify the appropriate recipient for the laptop handover.
paraphrase this: Yaseen's Adobe Acrobat account has been successfully transferred to your account.
Yaseen's Adobe Acrobat account has been successfully moved to your account.
paraphrase this: You may cancel or make the PO in ERP invalid to avoid payment.
To prevent payment, you have the option to cancel the PO or mark it as invalid in the ERP system.
paraphrase this: PR has already been signed by managers and Finance has to process the payment to vendor. We'll let you know once we received the laptop.
The PR has been approved by the managers, and it is now Finance's responsibility to arrange payment to the vendor. We will inform you once the laptop has been received.
paraphrase this: All devices are only temporary, as per ticket #SR-13293
According to ticket #SR-13293, all devices are provided on a temporary basis.
